name: story_rule_of_thirds
prompt: {prompt}, rule of thirds composition, subject placed on intersection points, balanced negative space, harmonious framing
negative_prompt: dead center composition, cluttered frame, unbalanced

name: story_center_symmetry
prompt: {prompt}, centered symmetrical composition, perfect balance, formal framing, monumental stability, Kubrick-esque one-point perspective

name: story_leading_lines
prompt: {prompt}, leading lines composition, converging geometric lines drawing eye to subject, strong perspective depth, architectural guides
negative_prompt: scattered composition, no depth cues, flat arrangement

name: story_closeup_portrait
prompt: {prompt}, emotional close-up portrait, face fills frame, intimate psychological focus, shallow background, micro-expression detail
negative_prompt: wide shot, distant subject, environment dominant

name: story_environmental_wide
prompt: {prompt}, environmental wide shot, full figure within vast landscape, human scale against nature, expansive context, establishing shot

name: story_dutch_angle
prompt: {prompt}, dutch angle tension composition, canted horizon, psychological unease, off-kilter frame, noir disorientation
negative_prompt: level stable composition, calm balanced framing

name: story_over_shoulder
prompt: {prompt}, over-the-shoulder shot, dialogue framing, partial foreground silhouette, spatial relationship between subjects, cinematic coverage
negative_prompt: single subject centered, flat front view

name: story_low_angle_hero
prompt: {prompt}, low angle hero composition, camera below subject looking up, monumental dominance, empowering perspective, mythic scale
